rejection_reason: compliance: email_require_legal_footer — nurture email is missing required CAN-SPAM footer. Physical address and unsubscribe link are mandatory on all commercial email regardless of sequence step.
text:
Subject: Re: {{company}}'s onboarding process

Hey {{first_name}},

Following up on my last note about FlowAI.

I came across {{company}}'s recent job postings — it looks like you're scaling the team fast. That's exactly when onboarding inefficiency tends to hurt the most.

We helped a team of similar size reduce their average ramp time from 4 months to 6 weeks. Happy to share how they did it.

Does Thursday or Friday work for a quick call?
